have h : ∀ s : S k, (s ∈ T k) ↔ (linearInvo k s ∈ U k) := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
    simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    constructor
    · intro hz
      linarith
    · intro hxyz
      linarith
  refine Fintype.card_of_bijective ?_
  refine ⟨fun t => ⟨linearInvo k t.1, (h t.1).mp t.2⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro ⟨t1, ht1⟩ ⟨t2, ht2⟩ heq
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at heq
    have : linearInvo k (linearInvo k t1) = linearInvo k (linearInvo k t2) := by
      rw [heq]
    simp only [linearInvo] at this
    ext
    have ⟨⟨x1, y1, z1⟩, _⟩ := t1
    have ⟨⟨x2, y2, z2⟩, _⟩ := t2
    simp only [linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at heq
    exact ⟨heq.2.1, heq.1, by linarith [heq.2.2]⟩
  · intro ⟨u, hu⟩
    have hu' : linearInvo k u ∈ T k := by
      have := (h (linearInvo k u)).mpr
      have h2 : linearInvo k (linearInvo k u) = u := by
        have := congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) u
        simp only [Pi.one_apply, sq, Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at this
        exact this
      rw [h2] at this
      exact this hu
    exact ⟨⟨linearInvo k u, hu'⟩, by simp [Subtype.ext_iff]; have := congr_fun (linearInvo_sq k) u; simp [sq, Function.comp_apply] at this; exact this⟩

have h_invol := linearInvo_sq k
  have h_no_fp := linearInvo_no_fixedPoints k
  have hT : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ T k ↔ linearInvo k s ∉ T k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    constructor <;> intro h <;> linarith
  have hU : ∀ s : S k, s ∈ U k ↔ linearInvo k s ∉ U k := by
    intro ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
    simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    constructor <;> intro h <;> linarith
  have cardT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    have : ∀ s, Xor' (s ∈ T k) (linearInvo k s ∈ T k) := fun s => by
      rw [xor_iff_not_iff]
      exact (hT s).symm
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl (T k)]
    have h_compl : ∀ s, s ∉ T k ↔ linearInvo k s ∈ T k := fun s => by
      rw [← hT s]; simp
    have : Fintype.card ↑(T k)ᶜ = Fintype.card (T k) := by
      refine Fintype.card_of_bijective ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, (h_compl s).mp hs⟩, ?_⟩
      constructor
      · intro ⟨a, ha⟩ ⟨b, hb⟩ heq
        simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at heq
        have : linearInvo k (linearInvo k a) = linearInvo k (linearInvo k b) := by rw [heq]
        simp only [← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), ← sq] at this
        rw [h_invol] at this
        simp at this
        exact Subtype.ext this
      · intro ⟨t, ht⟩
        use ⟨linearInvo k t, by rw [h_compl]; simpa [← Function.comp_apply, ← sq, h_invol] using ht⟩
        simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, ← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), ← sq, h_invol]
        rfl
    linarith [Fintype.card_subtype_compl (T k)]
  have cardU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl (U k)]
    have h_compl : ∀ s, s ∉ U k ↔ linearInvo k s ∈ U k := fun s => by
      rw [← hU s]; simp
    have : Fintype.card ↑(U k)ᶜ = Fintype.card (U k) := by
      refine Fintype.card_of_bijective ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, (h_compl s).mp hs⟩, ?_⟩
      constructor
      · intro ⟨a, ha⟩ ⟨b, hb⟩ heq
        simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at heq
        have : linearInvo k (linearInvo k a) = linearInvo k (linearInvo k b) := by rw [heq]
        simp only [← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), ← sq] at this
        rw [h_invol] at this
        simp at this
        exact Subtype.ext this
      · intro ⟨t, ht⟩
        use ⟨linearInvo k t, by rw [h_compl]; simpa [← Function.comp_apply, ← sq, h_invol] using ht⟩
        simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, ← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), ← sq, h_invol]
        rfl
    linarith [Fintype.card_subtype_compl (U k)]
  linarith

    · ring_nf; ring_nf at h; exact h.1
    · exact ⟨h.2.1, h.2.2⟩
  · simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, T, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ht ⊢
    linarith
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, hu⟩
    simp
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, ht⟩
    simp
congr 1

apply Fintype.card_congr
  exact {
    toFun := fun ⟨s, hu⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, by
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s
      simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo] at hu ⊢
      linarith⟩
    invFun := fun ⟨s, ht⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, by
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s
      simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo] at ht ⊢
      linarith⟩
    left_inv := fun ⟨s, _⟩ => by simp [linearInvo]
    right_inv := fun ⟨s, _⟩ => by simp [linearInvo]
  }

apply Fintype.card_congr
  refine ⟨fun ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, hu⟩ => ⟨⟨⟨x, y, x - y + z⟩, ?_⟩, ?_⟩, 
         fun ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, ht⟩ => ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z - x + y⟩, ?_⟩, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  all_goals simp only [S, T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
  all_goals try constructor
  all_goals try nlinarith [h.1, h.2.1, h.2.2]

have h := linearInvo_sq k
  have h_no_fp := linearInvo_no_fixedPoints k
  -- The linearInvo swaps z to -z, so it swaps "z > 0" with "z < 0"
  -- Similarly it swaps "(x-y)+z > 0" with "(y-x)+(-z) > 0" = "-(x-y+z) > 0" = "(x-y)+z < 0"
  -- Since linearInvo is a fixpoint-free involution, both T and U partition S k in half
  -- with their complements, and linearInvo exchanges T with its complement
  -- The key is showing linearInvo restricts to a bijection U ↔ T
  apply Fintype.card_of_bijective
  · refine ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Show linearInvo maps U to T
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hmem⟩ := s
      simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo] at hs ⊢
      linarith
    · -- Injective
      intro ⟨s1, hs1⟩ ⟨s2, hs2⟩ heq
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at heq ⊢
      have := congr_arg (linearInvo k) heq
      simp only [← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), ← sq] at this
      rw [linearInvo_sq] at this
      simp at this
      exact this
    · -- Surjective
      intro ⟨t, ht⟩
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hmem⟩ := t
      use ⟨linearInvo k t, ?_⟩
      · simp only [← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), ← sq, linearInvo_sq]
        simp
      · simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo] at ht ⊢
        simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ht
        linarith

have h_invo : linearInvo k ∘ linearInvo k = id := by
    have := linearInvo_sq k
    change linearInvo k ^ 2 = 1 at this
    simp [pow_two] at this
    exact this
  -- Define a bijection between T and U via linearInvo
  refine Fintype.card_of_bijective ?_
  use fun ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, by
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
    simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hU
    linarith⟩
  constructor
  · intro ⟨s1, h1⟩ ⟨s2, h2⟩ heq
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at heq
    have : linearInvo k (linearInvo k s1) = linearInvo k (linearInvo k s2) := by
      rw [heq]
    simp only [← Function.comp_apply (f := linearInvo k), h_invo, id_eq] at this
    exact Subtype.ext this
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hT⟩
    simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hT
    use ⟨linearInvo k ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, by
      simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, linearInvo]
      linarith⟩
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, linearInvo, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, neg_neg, and_self]

apply Fintype.card_congr
  refine ⟨fun ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, by
    simp only [linearInvo, T, Set.mem_setOf_eq, U] at hU ⊢; exact hU⟩,
    fun ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hT⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, by
    simp only [linearInvo, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq, T] at hT ⊢; linarith⟩,
    fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => by simp [linearInvo],
    fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => by simp [linearInvo]⟩

refine Fintype.card_congr ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, hu⟩
    exact ⟨⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ⊢; constructor; · ring_nf; linarith; exact ⟨h.2.1, h.2.2⟩⟩, by simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hu ⊢; linarith⟩
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, ht⟩
    exact ⟨⟨⟨x, y, -z⟩, by simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h ⊢; constructor; · ring_nf; linarith; exact ⟨h.2.1, h.2.2⟩⟩, by simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ht ⊢; linarith⟩
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, hu⟩
    simp only [Set.coe_setOf, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.mk.injEq]
    ring
  · intro ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩, ht⟩
    simp only [Set.coe_setOf, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Subtype.mk.injEq]
    ring

apply Fintype.card_congr
  exact {
    toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨s, by simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs ⊢; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; simp only at hs ⊢; nlinarith [h.2.1, h.2.2]⟩
    invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨s, by simp only [T, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs ⊢; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s; simp only at hs ⊢; linarith⟩
    left_inv := fun _ => rfl
    right_inv := fun _ => rfl
  }

apply Fintype.card_congr
  exact {
    toFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, by
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s
      simp only [U, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs
      simp only [linearInvo, T, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      linarith⟩
    invFun := fun ⟨s, hs⟩ => ⟨linearInvo k s, by
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h⟩ := s
      simp only [T, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs
      simp only [linearInvo, U, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      linarith⟩
    left_inv := fun ⟨s, _⟩ => by simp [linearInvo]
    right_inv := fun ⟨s, _⟩ => by simp [linearInvo]
  }
